title: nf-core/hadge pipeline parameters
description: Comprehensive pipeline for donor demultiplexing in single cell

input_output_options.title: Input/output options
input_output_options.description: Define where the pipeline should find input data and save output data.

input.description: Path to comma-separated file containing information about the samples in the experiment.
input.help_text: You will need to create a design file with information about the samples in your experiment before running the pipeline. Use this parameter to specify its location. It has to be a comma-separated file with 3 columns, and a header row. See [usage docs](https://nf-co.re/hadge/usage#samplesheet-input).

hash_tools.help_text: If you want to use multiple, separate with a comma. The available tools are: htodemux, multiseq, bff, demuxem, gmm-demux, hasheddrops, hashsolo

genetic_tools.help_text: If you want to use multiple, separate with a comma. The available tools are: vireo, demuxlet, freemuxlet, souporcell, cellsnp

common_variants.description: File with common variants. If provided, the BAM files will be filtered to only include reads that overlap with the common variants.

outdir.description: The output directory where the results will be saved. You have to use absolute paths to storage on Cloud infrastructure.

email.help_text: Set this parameter to your e-mail address to get a summary e-mail with details of the run sent to you when the workflow exits. If set in your user config file (`~/.nextflow/config`) then you don't need to specify this on the command line for every run.

multiqc_title.description: MultiQC report title. Printed as page header, used for filename if not otherwise specified.

reference_genome_options.title: Reference genome options
reference_genome_options.description: Reference genome related files and options required for the workflow.

genome.help_text:
If using a reference genome configured in the pipeline using iGenomes, use this parameter to give the ID for the reference. This is then used to build the full paths for all required reference genome files e.g. `--genome GRCh38`. 

See the [nf-core website docs](https://nf-co.re/usage/reference_genomes) for more details.

fasta.help_text: This parameter is *mandatory* if `--genome` is not specified, and is generally recommended to speed up execution. If omitted, the pipeline will download the entire iGenomes reference dataset specified with '--genome', resulting in long download times and high bandwidth usage. If you don't have a BWA index available this will be generated for you automatically. Combine with `--save_reference` to save BWA index for future runs.

igenomes_ignore.description: Do not load the iGenomes reference config.
igenomes_ignore.help_text: Do not load `igenomes.config` when running the pipeline. You may choose this option if you observe clashes between custom parameters and those supplied in `igenomes.config`.

igenomes_base.description: The base path to the igenomes reference files

donor_match_options.title: Donor match options
donor_match_options.description: Options for matching donors between different demultiplexing methods.

match_donor.description: Match donor between different demultiplexing methods.

demultiplexing_result.description: Path to demultiplexing result CSV file (necessary only for donor_match mode).

vireo_filtered_variants.description: Path to Vireo filtered variants file (necessary only for donor_match mode).

cell_genotype.description: Path to cell genotype file (necessary only for donor_match mode).

match_donor_method1.description: First method to use for donor matching.

match_donor_method2.description: Second method to use for donor matching.

subset_gt_donors.description: Option to subset the donor genotype based on detected variants.

variant_pct.description: The Minimal percentage of a variant for filtering. Has to be in a range between `[0,5;1[`. For example, 0.9 means that we only keep variants with a frequency higher than 90% or lower than 10%.

gt_donors.description: Path to cell genotype file (necessary only for donor_match mode).

demuxem_options.title: demuxEM options
demuxem_options.description: Options specific to the demuxEM tool for cell hashing demultiplexing.

demuxem_alpha_on_samples.description: The Dirichlet prior concentration parameter (alpha) on samples. An alpha value < 1.0 will make the prior sparse.

demuxem_min_num_genes.description: Only demultiplex cells/nuclei with at least this number of expressed genes.

demuxem_min_num_umis.description: Only demultiplex cells/nuclei with at least this number of UMIs.

demuxem_min_signal_hashtag.description: Any cell/nucleus with less than this count of hashtags from the signal will be marked as unknown.

demuxem_random_state.description: The random seed used in the KMeans algorithm to separate empty ADT droplets from others.

demuxem_gender_genes.description: Comma-separated list of gender-specific genes (e.g. Xist) for generating violin plots.

bff_options.title: BFF options
bff_options.description: Options specific to the BFF cell hashing demultiplexing.

bff_preprocessing.description: Whether to run preprocessing steps for BFF.

bff_barcodeWhitelist.description: Path to barcode whitelist for preprocessing.

bff_cellbarcodeWhitelist.description: Path to cell barcode whitelist for GenerateCellHashingCalls().

bff_methodsForConsensus.description: Methods to use for consensus calling.

bff_doTSNE.description: Whether to compute tSNE visualization in BFF.

bff_doHeatmap.description: Whether to generate heatmaps in BFF.

gmmdemux_options.title: GMM-Demux options
gmmdemux_options.description: Options specific to the GMM-Demux tool for cell hashing demultiplexing.

gmmdemux_hto_names.description: Comma separated list of HTO names, without whitespace. If null, hto_names are extracted from the input hto matrix from features.tsv.gz.

gmmdemux_estimated_n_cells.description: If specified, it will generate the statistic summary of the dataset, including MSM and SSM rates. This requires an estimated total number of cells in the assay as input.

gmmdemux_type_report.description: If true, full classification report is generated, otherwise the simplified classification report.

gmmdemux_summary_report.description: If true, summary report is generated.

gmmdemux_skip.description: Load a full classification report and skip the mtx folder as input. Requires a file path argument.

gmmdemux_examine.description: Provide the cell list. Requires a file path argument. Only executes if -u is set.

gmmdemux_extract.description: Names of the HTO tag(s) to extract, separated by ','. Joint HTO samples are combined with '+', such as 'HTO_1+HTO_2'.

gmmdemux_threshold.description: The confidence threshold value for classification. A higher value leads to more stringent classification.
gmmdemux_threshold.help_text: Requires a float in (0,1). Default value: 0.8

gmmdemux_random_state.description: The random seed used in the GaussianMixture algorithm.

hashsolo_options.title: Hashsolo options
hashsolo_options.description: Options specific to the Scanpy Hashsolo demultiplexing module.

hashsolo_cell_hashing_columns.description: Groovy list (['hash_1', 'hash_2']) of .obs columns that contain cell hashing counts. Can be null if the data is in 10x Genomics format, as the columns are derived from the input.

hashsolo_priors.description: List of comma-separated priors for each hypothesis: NEGATIVE, SINGLET, DOUBLET.

hashsolo_pre_existing_clusters.description: Column in cell_hashing_adata.obs for how to break up demultiplexing.

hashsolo_clustering_data.description: Input directory containing transcriptomic data in 10x mtx format.

hashsolo_number_of_noise_barcodes.description: Number of barcodes to use to create noise distribution.

hashsolo_round_digits.description: Number of decimal places to round numeric values in cell_hashing_data.obs before saving. If omitted, no rounding is applied.

htodemux_options.title: HTODemux options
htodemux_options.description: Options specific to the HTODemux tool for cell hashing demultiplexing.

htodemux_quantile.description: The quantile to use for thresholding.

htodemux_visualization_options.title: HTODemux visualization options
htodemux_visualization_options.description: Options specific to the HTODemux visualization tool for generating plots and visualizations.

htodemux_visualization_ridgeNCol.description: The number of plots that are dispalyed next to each other in one row. The number of plots corresponds to the number of Hash Tag Oligo (HTO) identifiers.

htodemux_visualization_featureScatter.description: Generate feature scatter plot. If no features are provided (one of them is null), the first two features from the assay will be used.

htodemux_visualization_scatterFeat1.description: Name of a Hash Tag Oligo (HTO) identifiers, usually defined in the `feature.tsv` of the hto matrix folder.

htodemux_visualization_scatterFeat2.description: Name of a Hash Tag Oligo (HTO) identifiers, usually defined in the `feature.tsv` of the hto matrix folder.

htodemux_visualization_vlnFeatures.description: Features to plot (gene expression, metrics, PC scores, anything that can be retrieved by FetchData).

htodemux_visualization_vlnLog.description: Plot the feature axis on log scale.

htodemux_visualization_tSNE.description: Generate a two dimensional tSNE embedding for HTOs.

htodemux_visualization_tSNEIdents.description: What should we remove from the object (we have Singlet, Doublet and Negative).

multiseqdemux_options.title: MultiSeqDemux options
multiseqdemux_options.description: Options specific to the MultiSeqDemux tool for cell hashing demultiplexing.

multiseqdemux_quantile.description: The quantile to use for thresholding.

hasheddrops_options.title: HashedDrops options
hasheddrops_options.description: Options specific to the HashedDrops tool for cell hashing demultiplexing.

hasheddrops_lower.description: Lower bound on total UMI count for empty droplets.

hasheddrops_niters.description: Number of iterations for Monte Carlo p-value calculations.

hasheddrops_byRank.description: Alternative method for identifying empty droplets.

hasheddrops_gene_col.description: Column to use for gene names.

hasheddrops_ambient.description: Whether to use ambient solution abundance.

hasheddrops_minProp.description: Minimum proportion for ambient profile inference.

hasheddrops_pseudoCount.description: Minimum pseudo-count for log-fold change computation.

hasheddrops_constantAmbient.description: Whether to use constant ambient contamination level.

hasheddrops_doubletNmads.description: Number of MADs to identify doublets.

hasheddrops_doubletMixture.description: Whether to use 2-component mixture model for doublets.

hasheddrops_confidentNmads.description: Number of MADs to identify confident singlets.

hasheddrops_confidentMin.description: Minimum threshold for confident singlet identification.

hasheddrops_combinations.description: An integer matrix specifying valid combinations of HTOs. Number of items in each row has to be the same.

hasheddrops_runEmptyDrops.description: Whether to run EmptyDrops analysis as part of HashedDrops.

preprocessing_options.title: Preprocessing options
preprocessing_options.description: Options for preprocessing data for HTODemux and MultiSeq demultiplexing.

hash_summary_options.title: Hash summary options
hash_summary_options.description: Options controlling hash summary and downstream exported formats.

generate_anndata.description: Generate AnnData (.h5ad) outputs for hashing results.

generate_mudata.description: Generate MuData outputs for hashing results.

cellsnp_options.title: CellSNP-lite options
cellsnp_options.description: Options specific to the CellSNP-lite tool for genotyping bi-allelic SNPs on single cells.

cellsnp_celltag.description: Tag for cell barcodes, e.g., CB for 10x Genomics. Set to 'None' for bulk RNA-seq or SMART-seq2.

cellsnp_umitag.description: Tag for UMI barcodes, e.g., UB for 10x Genomics. Set to 'None' for bulk RNA-seq or SMART-seq2 without UMIs.

cellsnp_mincount.description: Minimum aggregated count (across cells) for SNPs to be included in the output.

cellsnp_minmaf.description: Minimum minor allele frequency (MAF) for SNPs to be included in the output.

cellsnp_inclflag.description: Required flags in SAM/BAM: skip reads that don't have ALL of these flags. See SAM format specification for details.

cellsnp_exclflag.description: Excluding flags in SAM/BAM: skip reads that have ANY of these flags. See SAM format specification for details.

cellsnp_minlen.description: Minimum read length (after clipping) for a read to be included.

cellsnp_minmapq.description: Minimum mapping quality for a read to be included.

cellsnp_maxdepth.description: Maximum read depth at a position per input file. Set to 0 for highest possible value.

cellsnp_countorphan.description: If true, do not skip anomalous read pairs (i.e., count orphan reads).

vireo_options.title: Vireo options
vireo_options.description: Options specific to the Vireo tool for donor demultiplexing from single-cell RNA-seq data.

vireo_genotag.description: The tag for donor genotype in VCF file. Options: GT, GP, PL.

vireo_no_doublet.description: If true, do not check for doublets during demultiplexing.

vireo_n_init.description: Number of random initializations when GT needs to be learned.

vireo_extra_donor.description: Number of extra donors in pre-cluster, when GT needs to be learned.

vireo_extra_donor_mode.description: Method for searching from extra donors. 'size': n_cell per donor; 'distance': GT distance between donors.

vireo_force_learn_gt.description: If true, treat donor GT as prior only and learn genotypes from data.

vireo_ase_mode.description: If true, turn on SNP specific allelic ratio (ASE mode).

vireo_no_plot.description: If true, turn off plotting GT distance.

vireo_cell_range.description: Range of cells to process, e.g., '0-10000'. Default is 'all'.

vireo_cell_ambient_rnas.description: If true, detect ambient RNAs in each cell (experimental feature).

dsc_pileup_options.title: DSC-Pileup options
dsc_pileup_options.description: Options specific to the DSC-Pileup tool for pileup generation from single-cell BAM files.

dsc_pileup_tag_group.description: Tag representing readgroup or cell barcodes to partition the BAM file into multiple groups. For 10x Genomics, use CB.

dsc_pileup_tag_umi.description: Tag representing UMIs. For 10x Genomics, use UB.

dsc_pileup_cap_bq.description: Maximum base quality (higher BQ will be capped).

dsc_pileup_min_bq.description: Minimum base quality to consider (lower BQ will be skipped).

dsc_pileup_min_mq.description: Minimum mapping quality to consider (lower MQ will be ignored).

dsc_pileup_min_td.description: Minimum distance to the tail (lower will be ignored).

dsc_pileup_min_total.description: Minimum number of total reads for a droplet/cell to be considered.

dsc_pileup_min_uniq.description: Minimum number of unique reads (determined by UMI/SNP pair) for a droplet/cell to be considered.

dsc_pileup_min_snp.description: Minimum number of SNPs with coverage for a droplet/cell to be considered.

demuxlet_options.title: Demuxlet options
demuxlet_options.description: Options specific to the Demuxlet tool for genotype-based demultiplexing of single-cell RNA-seq data.

demuxlet_field.description: FORMAT field to extract the genotype, likelihood, or posterior from.

demuxlet_r2_info.description: INFO field name representing R2 value. Used for representing imputation quality.

demuxlet_alpha.description: Grid of alpha to search for.

freemuxlet_options.title: Freemuxlet options
freemuxlet_options.description: Options specific to the Freemuxlet tool for reference-free genotype-based demultiplexing.

freemuxlet_bf_thres.description: Bayes Factor Threshold used in the initial clustering.

freemuxlet_frac_init_clust.description: Fraction of droplets to be clustered in the very first round of initial clustering procedure.

freemuxlet_iter_init.description: Iteration for initial cluster assignment (set to zero to skip the iterations).

freemuxlet_keep_init_missing.description: Keep missing cluster assignment as missing in the initial iteration.

freemuxlet_randomize_singlet_score.description: Randomize the singlet scores to test its effect.

freemuxlet_seed.description: Seed for random number (use clocks if not set).

souporcell_options.title: Souporcell options
souporcell_options.description: Options specific to the Souporcell tool for clustering mixed-genotype scRNAseq experiments by individual.

souporcell_max_loci.description: Max loci per cell, affects speed.

souporcell_restarts.description: Number of restarts in clustering, when there are > 12 clusters we recommend increasing this to avoid local minima.

souporcell_common_variants.description: Common variant loci or known variant loci vcf, must be vs same reference fasta.

souporcell_known_genotypes.description: Known variants per clone in population vcf mode, must be .vcf right now we dont accept gzip or bcf sorry.

souporcell_known_genotypes_sample_names.description: Which samples in population vcf from known genotypes option represent the donors in your sample. Provide space-separated sample names for multiple donors.

souporcell_skip_remap.description: Don't remap with minimap2 (not recommended unless in conjunction with --common_variants).

souporcell_ignore.description: Set to True to ignore data error assertions.

institutional_config_options.title: Institutional config options
institutional_config_options.description: Parameters used to describe centralised config profiles. These should not be edited.
institutional_config_options.help_text: The centralised nf-core configuration profiles use a handful of pipeline parameters to describe themselves. This information is then printed to the Nextflow log when you run a pipeline. You should not need to change these values when you run a pipeline.

custom_config_version.description: Git commit id for Institutional configs.

custom_config_base.help_text: If you're running offline, Nextflow will not be able to fetch the institutional config files from the internet. If you don't need them, then this is not a problem. If you do need them, you should download the files from the repo and tell Nextflow where to find them with this parameter.

generic_options.title: Generic options
generic_options.description: Less common options for the pipeline, typically set in a config file.
generic_options.help_text:
These options are common to all nf-core pipelines and allow you to customise some of the core preferences for how the pipeline runs.

Typically these options would be set in a Nextflow config file loaded for all pipeline runs, such as `~/.nextflow/config`.

publish_dir_mode.description: Method used to save pipeline results to output directory.
publish_dir_mode.help_text: The Nextflow `publishDir` option specifies which intermediate files should be saved to the output directory. This option tells the pipeline what method should be used to move these files. See [Nextflow docs](https://www.nextflow.io/docs/latest/process.html#publishdir) for details.

email_on_fail.description: Email address for completion summary, only when pipeline fails.
email_on_fail.help_text: An email address to send a summary email to when the pipeline is completed - ONLY sent if the pipeline does not exit successfully.

plaintext_email.description: Send plain-text email instead of HTML.

max_multiqc_email_size.description: File size limit when attaching MultiQC reports to summary emails.

monochrome_logs.description: Do not use coloured log outputs.

hook_url.description: Incoming hook URL for messaging service
hook_url.help_text: Incoming hook URL for messaging service. Currently, MS Teams and Slack are supported.

multiqc_config.description: Custom config file to supply to MultiQC.

multiqc_logo.description: Custom logo file to supply to MultiQC. File name must also be set in the MultiQC config file

multiqc_methods_description.description: Custom MultiQC yaml file containing HTML including a methods description.

validate_params.description: Boolean whether to validate parameters against the schema at runtime

pipelines_testdata_base_path.description: Base URL or local path to location of pipeline test dataset files

trace_report_suffix.description: Suffix to add to the trace report filename. Default is the date and time in the format yyyy-MM-dd_HH-mm-ss.

help_full.description: Display the full detailed help message.

show_hidden.description: Display hidden parameters in the help message (only works when --help or --help_full are provided).
